sections.paragraph:
παραβάτης, ου, ὁ (παραβαίνω; s. prec. entry; in non-bibl. wr. mostly a warrior beside the charioteer, or a certain kind of foot-soldier) in our lit. only violator, transgressor (so Aeschyl., Eum. 553 [on the rdg. παρβάδαν s. Schwyzer II 492]; Pythag., Ep. 3, 7 παραβάται τᾶν ὁμολογιᾶν γινόμεθα; Polemo [Macrobius, Saturnalia 5, 19, 29] π. θεῶν; perh. PMich 478, 16 [II a.d.]; Suda on Ἀμάχιος; Sym.; π. τῆς τοῦ θεοῦ ἐντολῆς Did., Gen. 84, 27; Theoph. Ant. 2, 16 [p. 140, 13]) (τοῦ) νόμου Ro 2:25, 27; Js 2:11; Lk 6:4 D. Abs. sinner (Ps.-Clem., Hom. 3, 39) Gal 2:18 (WMundle, ZNW 23, 1924, 152f); Js 2:9.—DELG s.v. βαίνω. M-M. TW.

prec. prec. = preceding

non-bibl. wr. non-bibl. wr. = all Gk. lit. outside writings within biblical tradition or related belief systems

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

rdg. rdg. = reading(s)

Schwyzer Schwyzer = ES., Griechische Grammatik—List 6

Pythag Pythag = letters attributed to the phil. Pythagoras (VI–V b.c.); s. Ep.; date uncertain—List 5

Ep.

Ep. = Epistola/Epistula, when applied to letters mostly pseudonymous; various dates—List 5

  1. = epistle

perh. perh. = perhaps

PMich PMich = Michigan Papyri—List 4

Suda Suda = a lexical work (freq. cited as Suidas in handbooks); X a.d.—List 5

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

Did. Did. = Didymus Caecus (the Blind), commentator on OT books, IV a.d.—List 5

Theoph. Ant. Theoph. Ant. = Theophilus Antiochenus, II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Ps. Ps. = pseudo, pseudonymous

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

ZNW ZNW = Zeitschrift für die ntl. Wissenschaft—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 759
